allow: PowerShell($client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $client.Connect\("127.0.0.1", 8080\); Write-Output "MCP HTTP server is running on port 8080"; $client.Close\(\) } catch { Write-Output "Server still not reachable on port 8080" })

Bash(curl.exe -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:8080/mcp" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -H "Mcp-Session-Id: 4ab43759551b4a63addbfba9990dd46a" -d "{\\"jsonrpc\\":\\"2.0\\",\\"id\\":4,\\"method\\":\\"tools/call\\",\\"params\\":{\\"name\\":\\"manage_scene\\",\\"arguments\\":{\\"action\\":\\"get_info\\",\\"unity_instance\\":\\"Demon Lord Roguelike@742b8dd43152d9d1\\"}}}")

Bash(curl.exe -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:8080/mcp" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -H "Mcp-Session-Id: 4ab43759551b4a63addbfba9990dd46a" -d "{\\"jsonrpc\\":\\"2.0\\",\\"id\\":5,\\"method\\":\\"tools/call\\",\\"params\\":{\\"name\\":\\"manage_scene\\",\\"arguments\\":{\\"action\\":\\"get_active\\",\\"unity_instance\\":\\"Demon Lord Roguelike@742b8dd43152d9d1\\"}}}")

Bash(curl.exe -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:8080/mcp" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -H "Mcp-Session-Id: 4ab43759551b4a63addbfba9990dd46a" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":6,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"manage_gameobject","arguments":{"action":"create","name":"TestGameObject","unity_instance":"Demon Lord Roguelike@742b8dd43152d9d1"}}}')

PowerShell($body = '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/mcp" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 5; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 } catch { Write-Output "POST failed: $_"; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/sse" -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "SSE endpoint: $\($r2.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "SSE also failed: $_" } })

PowerShell($body = '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"claude-code","version":"1.0"}}}'; $headers = @{"Accept"="application/json, text/event-stream"; "Content-Type"="application/json"}; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/mcp" -Method POST -Body $body -Headers $headers -TimeoutSec 5; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(d['name']\) for d in data]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(item['path']\) for item in data.get\('tree',[]\) if 'Editor' in item['path'] and item['path'].endswith\('.cs'\)]")
